Package simpaths.model.taxes.database

Class MatchIndices

java.lang.Object
simpaths.model.taxes.database.MatchIndices
public class MatchIndices extends Object
CLASS TO STORE MATCHING INDICES TO ASSIST EXPANSION OF TAX DATABASE INPUT DATA
